headline: Assessing Sysco (SYY) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Why Sysco (SYY) Is Back on Investor Radar Sysco (SYY) is drawing fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at $76.56 and showing mixed short term performance, including a roughly 6% decline over the past month. See our latest analysis for Sysco. The recent 1 day share price return of 0.99% sits against a 30 day share price decline of 6.41%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 11.04% signals that longer term momentum has been steadier than the latest...
